questions.question: What is the term for the process of verifying and adding new blocks to the Ethereum blockchain, which involves solving complex mathematical problems?
What is the name of the Ethereum client that is known for its high scalability and high-performance capabilities?
questions.hint: Geth and Parity are examples of such clients

questions.question: What is the term for the concept of using smart contracts to automate the execution of specific rules or agreements on the Ethereum blockchain?
questions.hint: Self-executing contracts with the terms of the agreement directly written into lines of code
